description: Wesli, a Haitian-born and raised artist now thriving in Canada, stands out as a versatile singer, multi-instrumentalist, and producer who has become one of Haiti's most inspiring musical ambassadors. His unique compositions seamlessly blend traditional Haitian rhythms with an eclectic array of styles that reflect his broad musical influences and experiences. The JUNO and Canadian Folk Music Awards winning artist’s ability to fuse the vibrant sounds of his homeland with contemporary genres have captivated audiences worldwide.
title: Wesli Concert
